sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57184" key="khri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n57184.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have a waxy appearance</tr_>, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.215B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
